# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "App shell"
      element ns=html local="script" attrs=[]
        "window.APP=true;"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="noscript" attrs=[]
        "Please enable JavaScript."
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="div" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="id" value="app"}]
        "Loading\u{2026}"
      "\n"
